subject: Secure FE communications to the workflow backend
commit_message:
Secure FE communications to the workflow backend

Update of the workflow fe and be charts to secure the communications and to start the backend server is https mode with a secured connection to SDC

Issue-ID: OOM-1954

Signed-off-by: IlanaP <ilanap@amdocs.com>
Change-Id: Ia3c4c714e317b8f8b6b4ee9245daa50eea50275f
Signed-off-by: IlanaP <ilanap@amdocs.com>

Patch Set 3:

With the additional comment for the trustAll flag

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

Yes there is some global effort needed but it would be much easier if we stop adding extra work into it. Instead of this patch you should use aaf automated certificate generation. A good example how to use it can be found in commit: e62958b4f1d99fbe1df7a32ff6c4be74e9c6c536

Patch Set 3:

secrets should be added to all of sdc, but adding all the chart and chef changes should be done as part of a separate story.
currently the sdc-wfd-be still starts in http mode and this change will at least start it in https mode.

Patch Set 3:

I agree with Krzysztof that we better not add more work for the secrets task effort.
On the other hand, integrating with AAF to automatically generate a certificate is not trivial, and looks like we don't have the resources to do that.

Ilana, can you move the passwords to secrets instead? I think that's the best option for now.

Patch Set 3:

Sure, i will add some more entries to the secrets for sdc
